topic.what: Lightweight FPGA accelerator for HQC (Hamming Quasi-Cyclic) code-based KEM
topic.how: Novel hardware architectures for KeyGen/Encap/Decap with optimized components: constant-time sampler, single-port RAM polynomial multiplier, merged Galois field encoder, consistent-area decoder
topic.why_matters: Enables efficient deployment of backup NIST PQC scheme on resource-constrained FPGAs; achieves 13.66-49.87% EADP reduction over prior art

characteristics.what_it_measures: Equivalent Area-Delay Product for decapsulation operation
characteristics.vs_baseline: 13.66% lower than [12], 38.28% lower than [9]-II, 49.50% lower than [9]-I
characteristics.context: HQC-5 parameters; 138,509 cycles at 186 MHz; 20,046 ELUTs

characteristics.what_it_measures: Equivalent Area-Delay Product for encapsulation operation
characteristics.vs_baseline: 10.92% lower than [12], 54.12% lower than [9]-II, 67.56% lower than [9]-I
characteristics.context: HQC-5 parameters; 75,508 cycles at 200 MHz; 7,193 ELUTs

characteristics.what_it_measures: Equivalent Area-Delay Product for key generation operation
characteristics.context: HQC-5 parameters; 77,369 cycles at 220 MHz; 3,428 ELUTs

characteristics.what_it_measures: Maximum operating frequency across all security levels
characteristics.vs_baseline: Up to 38.8% higher than [9] for sampler
characteristics.evidence: Tables II-V; consistent 186-279 MHz across components

characteristics.what_it_measures: Block RAM tile consumption in upper-level operations
characteristics.context: No DSP blocks used; single-port RAM design

characteristics.what_it_measures: Decoder area stability across security levels
characteristics.vs_baseline: [12] shows linear resource growth with security level
characteristics.evidence: Table V; our decoder avoids linear scaling
characteristics.context: Consistent architecture design vs competitor's linear scaling

characteristics.evidence: Tables VI-VIII; all designs use 0 DSP

novelty: Constant-time fixed-weight sampler with Barrett reduction and pipelined Karatsuba multipliers
Single-port RAM polynomial multiplier with cache optimization reducing register usage from 2N to N
Merged Galois field multipliers in encoder reducing area without timing compromise
Consistent-area decoder design avoiding linear resource growth with security level
Novel data flow enabling parallel polynomial multiplications in Encap/Decap
open_problems: Further optimization for higher throughput scenarios
Integration with complete PQC protocol stacks
Power consumption optimization for battery-operated devices
